notes: Mode: pg-dump. InfinityOps Phoenix/Elixir backend uses Postgres for the MIE (Multi-Instance Execution) layer. The §77 deploy_from_git.sh on the VPS rebuilds the Elixir release without touching the DB, so a logical pg_dump captures the application state independently of the code rollback path. Container/db names are placeholders Owner must confirm on the VPS; if the actual deployment names differ, update this file before invoking /backup. restore_test verifies PGDMP magic. expected_size_bytes=256 MiB initial estimate.
